actual_title: Type Systems and the Discipline of Computational Representation

cards.title: Type Systems
cards.governance_note: Use types to make meanings, operations, constraints, and invalid states visible.

cards.title: Missingness Discipline
cards.governance_note: Represent absence explicitly with option, result, nullable, or missingness-reason types.

cards.title: Boundary Validation
cards.governance_note: Validate all external data boundaries before trusting internal representations.

cards.title: Type Governance
cards.governance_note: Review type drift as domains, schemas, policies, and workflows evolve.
